node.statement: N1.1 (Phi inherits almost-idempotence; P well-defined). By GT-hyp, Phi=Cj and F=jC with j a unital order-isometric Jordan embedding and C unital positive, and ||F^2-F||_cb<=eta with eta<=eta_0<1/4. By GT-idempotence (lem-idempotence-inheritance, H:=K), the operator-norm defect satisfies ||Phi^2-Phi||<=||F^2-F||<=||F^2-F||_cb<=eta<1/4 (op-norm <= cb-norm). Hence Phi is almost-idempotent below the 1/4 threshold, so by GT-idempotence P=theta(2Phi-1) (def-spectral-idempotent) is well-defined (the binomial series for R=(S^2)^{-1/2} converges since 4||Phi^2-Phi||<=4eta<1). Likewise Ftilde=theta(2F-1) is well-defined since ||F^2-F||<=eta<1/4.
